review_text: Absorbs quickly and keeps my skin calm all day. I would buy this again.
Good texture, but the scent is stronger than I expected for sensitive skin.
The lamp feels sturdy and the warm light makes evening work easier.
Looks nice, but the switch feels cheap and I worry it will not last.
Simple, durable, and saves me time when packing. Exactly what I needed.
Useful little case. I wish it had one more elastic loop for larger chargers.
